commit.message:
LU-17056 tests: dump more gss context traces - 4

Dump more gss context traces - 4

Test-Parameters: trivial
Test-Parameters: fortestonly
Test-Parameters: testlist=sanity-sec env=ONLY=30b,ONLY_REPEAT=30,SHARED_KEY=true mdscount=2 mdtcount=4 osscount=1 ostcount=8 clientcount=2 clientdistro=el8.7 serverdistro=el8.7
